meanings.definition: an institution created to conduct business
examples: he only invests in large well-established companies
he started the company in his garage

meanings.definition: small military unit; usually two or three platoons
the state of being with someone
examples: he enjoyed the society of his friends

meanings.definition: organization of performers and associated personnel (especially theatrical)
examples: the traveling company all stayed at the same hotel
the room was a mess because he hadn't expected company

meanings.definition: a social gathering of guests or companions
examples: the house was filled with company when I arrived

meanings.definition: a band of people associated temporarily in some activity
examples: they organized a party to search for food
the company of cooks walked into the kitchen

meanings.definition: crew of a ship including the officers; the whole force or personnel of a ship
a unit of firefighters including their equipment
